params.title: Favorite Lunch Foods
params.description: Horizontal bar graph appears. Favorite Lunch Foods data. Pizza=45, Tacos=25, Salad=10, Burgers=15. Scale of 5.

beats.text: How many more students chose pizza than salad? Remember what how many more tells us to do.
How many more students chose pizza than salad?

validator.description: Student selected 35, correct answer from subtraction 45 minus 10

beats.text: 35 more. How many more means compare. We subtract. Pizza is 45, salad is 10, so 45 minus 10 is 35.
